description: Use this API to delete the specified load from the working case. This API routine was first introduced in release 28.0.0. ierr = purgload(ibus, id)

parameters.name: ibus
parameters.description: Bus to which the load id is connected. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Identifier of the load to be removed. (input; ‘1’ by default).

error_codes.description: prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
